issues.description: SearchDeck does not support the complex multi-step logic: (1) look at 5 cards, (2) reveal up to 1 Kid Pirates card excluding Killer, (3) place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only searches deck without the 'exclude Killer' condition or the 'place rest at bottom' requirement.
Filter uses ByName which searches by card name, not card type. Should use ByType filter for {Kid Pirates} type, and must include exclusion logic for [Killer].

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Kid Pirates} type card other than [Killer] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
